channel.title: Azure Management Group Design on Larry James Henry
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Management Group Design on Larry James Henry

item.title: Design Your Azure Management Group and Subscription Hierarchy
item.description: Six months after the initial landing zone deployment, a new VP reorganizes the business units. Your management group tree — which you built to mirror the org chart — is now wrong. Every policy assignment, every RBAC scope, every cost report that referenced “BU-Finance” and “BU-Operations” needs to move. You spend two sprints refactoring infrastructure that was working fine. The reorganization didn’t break the business; your hierarchy design broke your platform.
